reference: Hello, I have an ingrown toenail that I have seen a doctor about multiple times. It is extremely painful to the point that I cannot wear socks, and it hurts to wear shoes and walk sometimes. It is leaky and has pus coming out of it. What should I do? I cannot get to the doctor until January.
text: Hello, I have an ingrown toenail that I have seen a doctor about multiple times. It is extremely painful to the point that I cannot wear socks, and it hurts to wear shoes and walk sometimes. It is leaky and has pus out of it. What should I do? I cannot get to the doctor until January.
